columns.label: Weight (0-100)
Meta
Debug notes
Pow
formattingExpressions: {{ (() => { const v = Number(item); if (!Number.isFinite(v)) return ''; if (v >= 90) return '#1565C0'; if (v >= 80) return '#BBDEFB'; if (v >= 70) return '#81C784'; if (v >= 60) return '#C8E6C9'; if (v >= 50) return '#FFF59D'; if (v >= 40) return '#FFE082'; if (v >= 30) return '#FFCC80'; if (v >= 20) return '#FFAB91'; return '#EF9A9A'; })() }}
conditionalFormatting: {{ (() => { const v = Number(item); if (!Number.isFinite(v)) return ''; if (v >= 90) return '#1565C0'; if (v >= 80) return '#BBDEFB'; if (v >= 70) return '#81C784'; if (v >= 60) return '#C8E6C9'; if (v >= 50) return '#FFF59D'; if (v >= 40) return '#FFE082'; if (v >= 30) return '#FFCC80'; if (v >= 20) return '#FFAB91'; return '#EF9A9A'; })() }}

columns.label: Klasse
formattingExpressions: {{ (() => { const k = currentSourceRow.Klasse ?? currentSourceRow.klasse; if (['Berserker','Warlord','Tank'].includes(k)) return '#ff8a80'; if (['Sprinter','Rogue','Charger'].includes(k)) return '#a5d6a7'; if (['Mage','Overseer','Templar'].includes(k)) return '#90caf9'; if (['Bard','Hero','Badass','Tactician'].includes(k)) return '#ffe082'; return ''; })() }}

{{ (() => { const k = currentSourceRow.Klasse ?? currentSourceRow.klasse; if (['Berserker','Warlord','Tank'].includes(k)) return '#b71c1c'; if (['Sprinter','Rogue','Charger'].includes(k)) return '#1b5e20'; if (['Mage','Overseer','Templar'].includes(k)) return '#0d47a1'; if (['Bard','Hero','Badass','Tactician'].includes(k)) return '#e65100'; return ''; })() }}
conditionalFormatting: {{ (() => { const k = currentSourceRow.Klasse ?? currentSourceRow.klasse; if (['Berserker','Warlord','Tank'].includes(k)) return '#ff8a80'; if (['Sprinter','Rogue','Charger'].includes(k)) return '#a5d6a7'; if (['Mage','Overseer','Templar'].includes(k)) return '#90caf9'; if (['Bard','Hero','Badass','Tactician'].includes(k)) return '#ffe082'; return ''; })() }}

formattingExpressions: {{ (()=>{ const col = 'count_gt20'; const rows = playersTable2.data || []; const vals = rows.map(r=>Number(r?.[col] ?? 0)); const min = vals.length? Math.min(...vals):0; const max = vals.length? Math.max(...vals):0; const v = Number(currentSourceRow?.[col] ?? 0); const norm = (v - min)/((max - min)||1); return norm>=0.75?'#2E7D32':norm>=0.5?'#66BB6A':norm>=0.25?'#FFEB3B':'#EF5350'; })() }}

{{ (()=>{ const col = 'count_gt20'; const rows = playersTable2.data || []; const vals = rows.map(r=>Number(r?.[col] ?? 0)); const min = vals.length? Math.min(...vals):0; const max = vals.length? Math.max(...vals):0; const v = Number(currentSourceRow?.[col] ?? 0); const norm = (v - min)/((max - min)||1); const bg = norm>=0.75?'#2E7D32':norm>=0.5?'#66BB6A':norm>=0.25?'#FFEB3B':'#EF5350'; return bg==='#EF5350' ? '#FFFFFF' : '#000000'; })() }}
